title: Micro Building!
description: This pack will allow you to create cute and beautyful micro cities! Micro building is a un-official upgrade of the "Mini Build" pack made by Gao15.
body:
## Quickly and clearly
- Currently adds a small number of buildings and decorations, but will be expanded in the future and updated often!
- This resource pack allows you to create beautyful micro-cities with the help of item frames! The decorations can be rotated by 45 degrees and are 1x1x1 in size.
- Follow this project for more updates!
- This pack has been made for versions around 1.20.1 and has been tested on 1.20.1, there is a high chance that it will work on any other version of Minecraft.
- The buildings have no collision if used with an item frame alone, with enough imagination they can be used with a mod like [Pehkui (clickable)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)!
- You can find more information below.

## Credit
- **[Original pack "Mini Build" and my inspiration (clickable)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mini-build 'Click here!')**
- **This pack was fully made by me and just inspired by Gao15's pack.**

## Guide
<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>

> **Use this command to get the special stick item, replace <NUMBER> with a number from the list below!**
- **/execute run give @s stick{CustomModelData:<NUMBER>}**
> **Use this command to get a special invisible item frame, it will have a glass pane for you to see it but you can safely get rid of the glass pane!**
- **/execute run give @s item_frame{EntityTag:{Item:{id:"minecraft:glass_pane",Count:1b},Invisible:1b}} 1**

- *Keep in mind, these commands will require permissions when on a server, you can find more about server usage below.*
</details>
<details>
<summary>List</summary>

> **Buildings:**
- **Yellow building (100)**
- **Blue building (101)**
- **Red building (102)**
- **Brick building (103)**
- **Green building (104)**
- **Yellow house #1 (400)**
- **Yellow house #2 (401)**
- **Green house #1 (402)**
- **Green house #2 (403)**
- **Brick house (404)**
- **Blue house (405)**
- **Red house #1 (406)**
- **Red house #2 (407)**
- **Skyscraper (500)**
- **Large skyscraper (501)**
> **Decorations:**
- **Turning road (303)**
- **Crossroad (302)**
- **Crosswalk road (301)**
- **Road (300)**
- **Oak tree (200)**
- **Large oak tree (201)**
- **Birch tree (202)**
- **Large birch tree (203)**
</details>
<details>
<summary>Server usage (technical)</summary>

- To use this on a server, you need to either get specific command permissions or operator.
- There are plugins that will make some things easier, you can combine [LuckPerms (clickable)](https://luckperms.net/) and [ItemEdit (clickable)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/itemedit-1-8-x-1-20-x.40993/) to get the best result for server usage!
- I also recommend [ItemUtils (clickable)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/item-utils)!
</details>
